baseline.reason: Accurately identifies the uninitialized r_symbol due to update_all_relocations allocating without zeroing, and dump_relocations returning early on slurp_rela_relocs failure. Trigger path correctly traces from process_object through process_relocs to process_got_section_contents free(). No unsupported speculation.

vastdb.reason: Correctly identifies the same root cause and trigger path. Notes that rels output parameter is unset on slurp failure. Equivalent in accuracy to baseline. No unsupported speculation.
